item.title: Show HN: Improved Search for WordPress
item.summary: Hi, I know you to be a discerning bunch of tech savvy people, but since that doesn't stop 50% of the web being powered by WordPress, I want to share how one can vastly improve the search experience on WordPress sites: SearchCue! It's a product we built after building Monocle Search for Squarespace, so we got a real head-start on this one. It's typeahead search for pages and documents, marryied with ai answers and "conversational search" where those add value. We are pretty proud of what we have built over these last two years (while SearchCue and the WordPress plugin is new, the underlying search tech is something we have painstakingly built up over the two past years). I'd really appreciate your thoughts and feedback and I am more than happy to answer any questions you might have! Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48991779 Points: 1 # Comments: 0
